title: Panama Unveils EU-Backed Regulations to Propel Green Hydrogen Market
content: Panama collaborates with the EU to propose new regulations to become a green hydrogen production and export hub, targeting 500,000 tonnes annually by 2030. The regulations will boost investor confidence, streamline permitting, and support hydrogen-based maritime fuels. Panama's National Energy Secretariat (SNE), in collaboration with the European Union (EU), has completed a draft regulatory framework to facilitate the growth of its green hydrogen market.
author: Analysts Account
